entry.title: Hal Jordan might be careless, yet Batman is always observant
entry.summary:
Author: RestockedBrain

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,797Chapters: 2/3Kudos: 41

Summary: Ollie and Hal made a bet: within one week, Hal had to get Batman to admit out loud that they were friends. Hal took the bet, although he didn't think they were friends. Bruce thought they were friends, but he decided to say nothing.

entry.title: I'll Believe In Anything by Wolf Parade
entry.summary:
Author: PumpkinWritesFandom

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,544Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Hal was not a woman, nor a man. Hal Jordan was simply Hal Jordan, and what that meant was entirely up to him. The problem? Hal hasn't been Hal Jordan in a very long time, if he ever was anyways.

entry.title: Gotham is the worst
entry.summary:
Author: Frey_S

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 117,037Chapters: 22/?Kudos: 1,044

Summary: On top of Hal's list of things he hates are three things: charity galas, Gotham and Batman. So of course he ends up dealing with all of those in one night, even if he doesn't technically know he ends up sleeping with that last one. He's never letting Carol drag him to rich people events ever again. In which Hal dates Bruce Wayne. Tells him he's Green Lantern. Breaks up with him. And then sort of dates Batman without knowing that he is in fact sleeping with Bruce Wayne again.

entry.title: Changing Genre… Romance Isekai!!!
entry.summary:
Author: RegretsEverything

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,780Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 186

Summary: Hal groans. "No way!! Why am I the third love interest?? Like, not even the second?!" "Shut it." Bruce's left eye twitches as he looks at his status window. "At least you aren't described like a Dark Romance love interest." Hal whistles, glancing at what Bruce was looking at. "Yikes… Everyone wants the cold duke of the north, but no one wants to be him." "Hey! At least you don't have to fake not being an orphan, since even here, you're parentless." Hal shrugs, patting Bruce's shoulder. Bruce gives him a look. "I hope you get killed in the war with the Demon King." ------ Or Hal and Bruce accidentally need to get isekai'd into a dating sim as the second and third love interests, who are supposed to hate each other (something that's not that difficult to replicate). The only way back home is for the Main Character to fall in love and finish the game. While dodging bad endings, death flags, conspiracies, and clichés, Hal and Bruce start feeling something more than their usual annoyance with each other. Introducing!! The Playful Cocky Master of the Mage Tower, Hal Jordan x The Broody Cold Duke of The North, Bruce Wayne.

  • No Archive Warnings Apply

entry.title: The room where sunlight could not reach [English version]
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 14,983Chapters: 2/5Kudos: 141

Summary: His amber eyes were the only warm thing in that dreadful room, and they were saying to Bruce, "Have your ways with me, however you like." Every confession shall be heard and every sin shall be forgiven. "Bruce," he called Bruce, with his honeyed lips, "Fuck me." Or. Hal woke up inside a room with just him and 5 other Bruces. And his Bruce, the one he had just fought with yesterday, told him that all 5 versions of Bruce Wayne needed to be satisfied for them to leave the room.Satisfy how? Sexually, of course.

entry.title: Entangled
entry.summary:
Author: RebeccaAnabelBurrows

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,550Chapters: 3/?Kudos: 62

Summary: Other tags : Spousal Privilege, House ArrestAfter a kind gesture backfires, Hal finds himself facing an investigation from the Corps for complicity in murder.Worse, Bruce's testimony could get him deeper into trouble. Well, they can work something out.As they dig deeper into the case and try to fix things, Bruce and Hal face new issues, one of them being how to cohabitate for any length of time without letting their growing feelings get the better of them.

entry.title: The Best Financial Peril Kyle Rayner Has Ever Made and the Damnation of Jason Todd
entry.summary:
Author: The Architect (Ophrenia)

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,732Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 62

Summary: The blue light of his laptop softened and cooled against the warmth of Kyle’s skin. The artist sat at his desk, the armrests caging, jailing, and tightening up each breath and movement. He was alone. Alone and waiting. Because this was suffering—this was torment—this was eternal agony. This was practically hell.

entry.title: Form 51
entry.summary:
Author: RebeccaAnabelBurrows

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,852Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 122

Summary: Her Lantern instructor's tax return is an unusual color. Jess investigates. “So, welcome to your ‘How to fill my tax return from space’ class. It wasn't really planned in your curriculum but some of you told me about this specific shortcoming so here we are. Any questions before we start ?” “I hate you,” Jo mouthed at Jess while Simon kicked her in the shin.

entry.title: a fair exchange
entry.summary:
Author: highvball

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,391Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 326

Summary: "You may go. I'll collect the child when it's time." Bruce didn't move. Hal paused mid-step. He turned, one eyebrow arching. "I said you may go." "I heard you." Bruce's voice was calm, unreadable. "There's a... problem." "A problem?” "I agreed to give you my firstborn. That's binding. You can't lie, and I assume you can't break a pact either." Hal's eyes narrowed. "Your point?" "I have no wife," Bruce said. "No betrothed. No lover. No one to bear the child." or How I Saved My Best Friend by Impregnating an Ancient Forest God: A Practical Guide by Bruce W.

entry.title: Soulmates, secrets, and kisses
entry.summary:
Author: rie_rotisse

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 115,529Chapters: 19/25Kudos: 1,694

Summary: In this world where almost everyone is born with a soulmark that writes the first sentence your soulmate says to you, many, many have expected Damian's soulmark to be something… fancy, gaudy, and pretentious, even.But then again, nothing is crueler than fate and love, after all.Damian was born with a soulmark on his left chest, right on his heart, written in the colour of gold (of course, it is gold).The soulmark reads.[Hey, that's my chips!]Yes.What an anti-climax. A disappointment, even. [Rating has been changed to avoid spoilers and stuff]

entry.title: Oh my god I have a crush on Batman.
entry.summary:
Author: SeekerOfMischief

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,338Chapters: 1/2Kudos: 43

Summary: Squeal to my other work “Five Hundred Dollars” but can still definitely be read a standalone. I swallowed, forcing some confidence back into my system. “How about you help me with another dare?” “Mhm. Depends.” “A dance,” I said. “Can’t afford to lose.” Bruce hummed thoughtfully, I could practically feel his gaze dragging slowly over me in a way that absolutely should not have been legal.
